1.description: Fetch Kristiansand municipality geometry and attributes (municipality name, county)

2.description: Fetch 200-year storm-surge areas (klimaår nå) for Kristiansand municipality

4.description: Filter buildings within 50 metres of storm-surge areas

5.description: Calculate distance from each building to the nearest storm-surge area

6.description: Sort buildings by shortest distance to storm-surge areas

args.sql:
SELECT
    kn.kommunenummer,
    kn.kommunenavn,
    fylke.fylkesnavn,
    ST_AsGeoJSON(ST_Transform(kn.omrade, 4326)) AS kommune_geom_geojson
FROM
    kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune kn
JOIN
    kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.grense gr ON kn.kommunenummer = gr.kommunenummer
JOIN
    fylker fylke ON kn.fylkesnummer = fylke.fylkesnummer
WHERE
    kn.kommunenavn = 'Kristiansand';

1.description: Fetch Kristiansand municipality geometry and identifiers (kommunenummer, kommunenavn, fylkenavn)

2.description: Fetch 200-year storm-surge areas (stormflohavniva) for Kristiansand using kommunenummer filter

3.description: Fetch buildings in Kristiansand municipality (filtered by kommunenummer)

4.description: Filter buildings within 50 metres of storm-surge areas

5.description: Compute shortest distance from each building to storm-surge area

8.description: Select final columns: building_id, kommunenavn, fylkenavn, distance_m
